description: Without axis titles, a reader cannot immediately understand what the x-axis numbers (80–94) represent or what the y-axis monetary values (€0M–€120M) measure, forcing them to guess the meaning from context alone. The absence of labels like "Overall Rating" and "Market Value (€)" makes the chart ambiguous — the x-axis could be mistaken for age, jersey numbers, or any other numeric attribute. This omission significantly reduces the chart's interpretability and could lead to misreading the relationship being shown.
